subject: feat(ml): add sentence embedding model for fuzzy grouping
body:
Add all-MiniLM-L6-v2 sentence-transformer as a second ML model alongside
the existing zero-shot NLI classifier. This enables semantic similarity
for grouping bank transaction descriptions during import (e.g. merging
"WOOLWORTHS SANDTON" with "WOOLWORTHS CBD 0232").

- New embeddingWorker.ts: Web Worker running feature-extraction pipeline
  with greedy single-linkage clustering (cosine similarity, threshold 0.75)
- New useEmbeddings.ts: Singleton composable with ref-counting, tracked
  timeouts, typed pending maps (same battle-tested patterns as useTagSuggestions)
- DB v8 migration: embeddingCache table for persisting computed embeddings
- ImportStepClassify: after exact grouping, merges semantically similar
  groups if embedding model is ready (graceful fallback to exact match)
- NewImportWizard: preloads embedding model during Step 1 alongside tag model

Tags: ml, embeddings, import, similarity, clustering
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: auto-tagging-imports
Semver: minor
